# Paths excluded from the trufflehog secret scan (--exclude-paths).
# One path regex per line.
#
# test-projects/ holds E2E fixtures. Their brik.yml files no longer embed
# credentials (bare URLs + token_var since the token_var campaign), but the
# scan walks every blob of the pushed range and the pre-campaign revisions
# carried the lab's documented Gitea credentials as URL userinfo. Local-lab
# fixtures published in the README, not real secrets.
^test-projects/
# README documents lab service URLs (e.g. the GitLab SSH endpoint) that the scan
# reads as unverified URIs; they are published access docs, not secrets.
^README\.md$
# A past revision of THIS file spelled out a lab URI it was excluding, and the
# scan walks every blob of the pushed range: exclude the file itself so its
# history cannot re-trip the URI detector. It documents patterns, never values.
^\.github/trufflehog-exclude\.txt$
